name: Ayam Bumbu Rojak (Chicken with Spicy Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into serving portions.
2. Fry onion and garlic in oil until golden brown. Add brown sugar, chili, grated candlenuts, and shrimp paste, then stir.
3. Add the chicken to the spicy mixture.
4. Incorporate tamarind juice, soy sauce, 1 cup water, and salt.
5. Cover tightly and cook slowly until the liquid is completely absorbed by the chicken.
6. Serve with rice.
